LanguageData.Ammo_9x20mmRed_FMJ.label: 9x20mm Redemption (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_9x20mmRed_FMJ.description: Common pistol cartridge used by a variety of Super Earth-manufactured handguns and SMGs.

LanguageData.Ammo_9x20mmRed_AP.description: Common pistol cartridge used by a variety of Super Earth-manufactured handguns and SMGs.
LanguageData.Ammo_9x20mmRed_HP.label: 9x20mm Redemption (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_9x20mmRed_HP.description: Common pistol cartridge used by a variety of Super Earth-manufactured handguns and SMGs.
LanguageData.Bullet_9x20mmRed_FMJ.label: 9mm Redemption bullet (FMJ)
